section_name: Free passage for funeral procession vehicles
chapter_title: Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
text: Any person or vehicle participating in a funeral procession shall be allowed to pass free through all tollgates, tunnels, toll bridges and ferries. [1991 c.482 §11]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 811. Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
##### § 811.812 — Free passage for funeral procession vehicles

Any person or vehicle participating in a funeral procession shall be allowed to pass free through all tollgates, tunnels, toll bridges and ferries. [1991 c.482 §11]

subsections.text: Any person or vehicle participating in a funeral procession shall be allowed to pass free through all tollgates, tunnels, toll bridges and ferries. [1991 c.482 §11]
